nodes.name: ElevenLabs — Text to Speech
nodes.notes:
🎤 CHANGE YOUR VOICE HERE

To use a different ElevenLabs voice:
1. Go to elevenlabs.io → Voices
2. Copy the Voice ID
3. Set it in your ai_configurations table (elevenlabs_voice_id column)

Popular Voice IDs:
• Rachel: 21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM
• Domi: AZnzlk1XvdvUeBnXmlld
• Bella: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL
• Antoni: ErXwobaYiN019PkySvjV
• Elli: MF3mGyEYCl7XYWbV9V6O
• Josh: TxGEqnHWrfWFTfGW9XjX
• Arnold: VR6AewLTigWG4xSOukaG
• Adam: pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB
• Sam: yoZ06aMxZJJ28mfd3POQ

Models:
• eleven_turbo_v2_5 (fastest, recommended)
• eleven_multilingual_v2 (best quality)
• eleven_monolingual_v1 (English only)

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, store_id, role, content) VALUES ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', '{{ $json.store_id }}', 'customer', {{ $json.transcript | toJSON }}), ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', '{{ $json.store_id }}', 'assistant', {{ $json.ai_response | toJSON }});
